metadata.description: Azure region for the resource group and all resources.
Workload / application name used in resource names.
Environment token used in resource names (e.g. prod, dev, test).
Region abbreviation used in resource names (e.g. swe for Sweden Central).
Storage account name (globally unique, 3-24 lowercase alphanumeric, no hyphens).
SQL logical server name (globally unique, lowercase).
SQL administrator password. Provide securely at deploy time.
Optional local client IP to whitelist on the SQL firewall (for migrations/SSMS).
JWT signing secret (32+ chars). Provide securely at deploy time.
Loki ingestion URL for monitoring (optional until ready).
Deploy the Grafana/Prometheus/Loki monitoring stack on a Linux VM (#49).
Grafana admin password for the monitoring stack. Required when deployMonitoring is true.
VM admin password for the monitoring VM. Required when deployMonitoring is true.
Linux runtime stack for the App Service. Repo targets .NET 10.
Optional local client IP to whitelist on the SQL firewall.
Loki ingestion URL for monitoring (optional until ready).
Deploy the Grafana/Prometheus/Loki monitoring stack on a Linux VM (#49).
Grafana admin password for the monitoring stack.
VM admin password for the monitoring VM. Required when deployMonitoring is true.
Linux runtime stack for the App Service.
VM name for the monitoring stack.
DNS name label for the monitoring public IP (Grafana).
Storage account name backing the monitoring config share (globally unique).
Azure region for the storage account.
Globally-unique storage account name (3-24 lowercase alphanumeric).
Blob container that holds cat photos.
Name of the created storage account.
Resource ID of the storage account.
Azure region for the SQL server and database.
Globally-unique logical SQL server name (without the .database.windows.net suffix).
Optional client IP to whitelist for local connections. Leave empty to skip.
Azure region for the Key Vault.
Azure AD tenant that owns the vault.
Storage account name used to derive the blob connection string.
SQL server FQDN used to derive the database connection string.

variables.dbConnectionString: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog={1};Persist Security Info=False;User ID={2};Password={3};Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', parameters('sqlServerFqdn'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), parameters('sqlAdminLogin'), parameters('sqlAdminPassword'))]

metadata.description: Name of the created Key Vault.
DNS name label for the public IP (<label>.<region>.cloudapp.azure.com).
Storage account name backing the Azure Files config share (3-24 lowercase alphanumeric).
Azure Files share name holding Prometheus/Loki/Grafana config + dashboards.
VM administrator password. Use a strong password (12+ chars, mixed case, digits, symbols).
VM SKU. Standard_B2s (2 vCPU / 4 GB RAM) comfortably runs all three services at ~$30/month.

variables.dockerComposeContent:
[format('version: "3.8"
services:
  grafana:
    image: {0}
    restart: always
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    env_file: /etc/monitoring.env
    volumes:
      - /mnt/monitoring-config:/mnt/config:ro
      - grafana_data:/var/lib/grafana
  prometheus:
    image: {1}
    restart: always
    command:
      - "--config.file=/mnt/config/prometheus/prometheus.prod.yml"
      - "--storage.tsdb.path=/prometheus"
      - "--storage.tsdb.retention.time=30d"
    volumes:
      - /mnt/monitoring-config:/mnt/config:ro
      - prometheus_data:/prometheus
  loki:
    image: {2}
    restart: always
    command:
      - "-config.file=/mnt/config/loki/loki-config.yml"
    ports:
      - "3100:3100"
    volumes:
      - /mnt/monitoring-config:/mnt/config:ro
      - loki_data:/loki
volumes:
  grafana_data:
  prometheus_data:
  loki_data:
', parameters('grafanaImage'), parameters('prometheusImage'), parameters('lokiImage'))]

osProfile.customData:
[base64(format('#cloud-config
package_update: true
packages:
  - docker.io
  - docker-compose
  - cifs-utils

write_files:
  - path: /etc/cifs-monitoring-creds
    encoding: b64
    permissions: "0600"
    content: {0}
  - path: /etc/monitoring.env
    encoding: b64
    permissions: "0600"
    content: {1}
  - path: /opt/monitoring/docker-compose.yml
    encoding: b64
    permissions: "0644"
    content: {2}

runcmd:
  - mkdir -p /mnt/monitoring-config
  - chmod 600 /etc/cifs-monitoring-creds /etc/monitoring.env
  - mount -t cifs //{3}.file.core.windows.net/{4} /mnt/monitoring-config -o vers=3.0,credentials=/etc/cifs-monitoring-creds,dir_mode=0755,file_mode=0644,serverino,nofail || true
  - echo "//{5}.file.core.windows.net/{6} /mnt/monitoring-config cifs vers=3.0,credentials=/etc/cifs-monitoring-creds,dir_mode=0755,file_mode=0644,serverino,nofail 0 0" >> /etc/fstab
  - systemctl enable docker
  - systemctl start docker
  - sleep 15
  - cd /opt/monitoring && docker-compose up -d
', base64(format('username={0}
password={1}
', parameters('storageAccountName'), listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-05-01').keys[0].value)), base64(variables('monitoringEnvContent')), base64(variables('dockerComposeContent')), parameters('storageAccountName'), parameters('configShareName'), parameters('storageAccountName'), parameters('configShareName')))]

metadata.description: Public Loki ingestion URL the App Service pushes logs to.
Storage account name backing the config share.
Config file share name to upload Prometheus/Loki/Grafana files into.
VM name — pass to "az vm run-command invoke" or "az vm restart" to manage the stack.
Azure region for the plan and app.
App Service (web app) name. Also the public host: <name>.azurewebsites.net.
Linux runtime stack. Repo targets .NET 10; override if deploying a different runtime.
Key Vault name that holds the referenced secrets.
Whether a LokiUrl secret exists in Key Vault and should be referenced.
Effective Loki ingestion URL wired into the App Service (empty if logging to Loki is disabled).
Public Grafana URL (empty unless deployMonitoring is true).
Effective Loki ingestion URL wired into the App Service.
Public Grafana URL (empty unless deployMonitoring is true).
